title: skills.rs: parse_skill_file does not strip BOM or normalize line endings — Windows-saved skill files silently fail
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dimension: Functional Correctness / Documentation. Location: src/skills.rs:37-55 (parse_skill_file). Violation: A skill file saved on Windows with a UTF-8 BOM (0xEF 0xBB 0xBF) fails the  check because the content starts with the BOM. Likewise, a CRLF-terminated --- delimiter fails on some path. The function silently returns None. No log, no error surfaced to user. Mandated Refactor: Strip BOM at read time (content.trim_start_matches('\u{FEFF}')); normalize \r\n to \n before frontmatter parsing; return Result<SkillDefinition, SkillParseError> so load_skills can log the specific failure per file.
